channel.title: Ma119s on MathTR
channel.description: Recent content in Ma119s on MathTR

item.description: <!DOCTYPE html> MA119 Learning Goals MA119 Learning Goals There are in total learning goals. Check the goals you have mastered and click the following button to see your level of mastery. Check My Level of Mastery Congratulation! You have mastered about of learning goals. Algebra Preliminaries R-1. Arithmetic I can simplify fractions. I can perform the operations addition, subtraction, multiplication and division on real numbers using order of operations. I can evaluate and simplify arithmetic expressions without the use of a calculator.
